scripts.prebuild: npm pkg set version=$(cat ../VERSION 2>/dev/null || tr -d '\n' < ../script.module.web-pdb/addon.xml | grep -oP '<addon[^>]*version="\K[^"]+')
scripts.prebuild-dev: npm pkg set version=$(cat ../VERSION 2>/dev/null || tr -d '\n' < ../script.module.web-pdb/addon.xml | grep -oP '<addon[^>]*version="\K[^"]+'))
scripts.prewatch: npm pkg set version=$(cat ../VERSION 2>/dev/null || tr -d '\n' < ../script.module.web-pdb/addon.xml | grep -oP '<addon[^>]*version="\K[^"]+'))
